zh.lifeSummary: 當Elena de Morville於大約1166年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德吉爾可斯瓦爾德時，她的父親Richard de Morville42歲，母親Hawise de Lancaster28歲。她於大約1185年與Roland MacUchtred of Galloway在英國波藍德吉爾可斯瓦爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1217年6月11日在蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾吉德布萊特享年52歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾吉德布萊特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elena de Morville于大约1166年出生在英国英格兰波藍德吉爾可斯瓦爾德时，她的父亲Richard de Morville42岁，母亲Hawise de Lancaster28岁。她于大约1185年与Roland MacUchtred of Galloway在英国波藍德吉爾可斯瓦爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1217年6月11日在苏格兰吉德布萊次爾吉德布萊特享年52岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰吉德布萊次爾吉德布萊特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moorfield
meanings: English: locative name from Morville (Shrops), which is recorded as Mamerfeld in the 12th century, Momerefeld in 1255, and Morfelde in 1464.

nameMeanings.name: Elena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , now used quite frequently in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Elena de Morville was born about 1166, in Kirkoswald, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard de Morville, was 42 and her mother, Hawise de Lancaster, was 28. She married Roland MacUchtred of Galloway about 1185, in Kirkoswald, Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 11 June 1217, in Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, at the age of 52, and was buried in Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elena de Morville est née environ 1166, à Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Morville, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Lancaster, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Roland MacUchtred of Galloway environ 1185, à Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 juin 1217, à Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elena de Morville um 1166 in Kirkoswald, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Morville 42 und ihre Mutter Hawise de Lancaster 28. Sie hat um 1185 in Kirkoswald, Cumberland, England Roland MacUchtred of Galloway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Juni 1217 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland und wurde in Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elena de Morville è nata il circa 1166 nel Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard de Morville, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Hawise de Lancaster, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Roland MacUchtred of Galloway circa 1185, nel Kirkoswald, Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 giugno 1217, nel Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elena de Morvilleが約1166年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドキルコスワルドで生まれた時，父Richard de Morvilleは42歳，母Hawise de Lancasterは28歳であった。約1185年にイギリスクウンバーランドキルコスワルドでRoland MacUchtred of Gallowayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1217年6月11日にスコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアキルククウドブリトで52歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアキルククウドブリトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elena de Morville(이)가 대략 1166년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 커코즈월드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Morville(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise de Lancaster(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1185년 영국 c벌랜드 커코즈월드에서 Roland MacUchtred of Galloway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1217년 6월 11일 스컷랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르 커kc드브라이트에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르 커kc드브라이트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elena de Morville nasceu aproximadamente 1166, em Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Morville, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Lancaster, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Roland MacUchtred of Galloway aproximadamente 1185, em Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de junho de 1217, em Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elena de Morville родилась около 1166 г. в местности киркосвалд, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard de Morville было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Lancaster, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roland MacUchtred of Galloway около 1185 г. в местности киркосвалд, кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 11 июня 1217 г. в местности кирккудбраит, кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности кирккудбраит, кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elena de Morville nació aproximadamente 1166, en Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard de Morville, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Hawise de Lancaster, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Roland MacUchtred of Galloway aproximadamente 1185, en Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de junio de 1217, en Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Kirkcudbright, Kirkcudbrightshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
